headline: S&P Global (SPGI) Surges 3.3%: Is This an Indication of Further Gains?
summary: S&P Global (SPGI) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock doesn't suggest further strength down the road.

headline: Why investors are rotating into mid and small-cap stocks
summary: Monetary Matters Network Co-Founder Jack Farley and AInvest Managing Editor Adam Shapiro join Julie Hyman on Morning Brief to discuss the market's rotation into mid-cap and small-cap stocks, highlighting which sectors are benefiting most.

headline: SpaceX Is Joining the Russell 1000. Will It Help the Stock Reverse Course?
summary: The shares should be getting a boost Monday as it’s set to begin trading in a major stock index for the first time, after joining the Russell 1000 after the close Friday.

headline: Compass Minerals Announces S&P Global Ratings Upgrade to B+
summary: OVERLAND PARK, Kan., June 29, 2026--Compass Minerals International, Inc. (NYSE: CMP) ("Compass Minerals" or the "Company") today announced that S&P Global Ratings has upgraded the Company’s corporate credit rating to ‘B+’ from ‘B’, with a stable outlook. S&P also upgraded the rating on the Company’s senior secured debt to ‘BB’ from ‘BB-‘ and senior unsecured debt to ‘B+’ from ‘B’. In addition, S&P’s ‘1’ recovery rating on the secured debt and ‘4’ recovery rating on the unsecured debt are unchang

headline: China's economy picks up in June on rebounding U.S. exports, analysts say
summary: China's economy is showing signs of picking up after a sluggish few months — thanks in part to a rebound in shipments to the U.S.
